title: Shear sheep to professional level
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Shear sheep to professional level demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for shearing operation

pcs.text: Identify relevant awards, agreements and workplace policies and standards associated with shearing sheep
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant awards, agreements and workplace policies and standards associated with shearing sheep?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant awards, agreements and workplace policies and standards associated with shearing sheep.

pcs.text: Communicate with other wool harvesting team members to discuss requirements for a smooth operation to attain output levels and maintain quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with other wool harvesting team members to discuss requirements for a smooth operation to attain output levels and maintain quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with other wool harvesting team members to discuss requirements for a smooth operation to attain output levels and maintain quality standards.

pcs.text: Gather and check shearing equipment for functionality according to workplace standards and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather and check shearing equipment for functionality according to workplace standards and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather and check shearing equipment for functionality according to workplace standards and manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Identify shearing techniques and shears used for crossbred sheep and merino sheep
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify shearing techniques and shears used for crossbred sheep and merino sheep?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify shearing techniques and shears used for crossbred sheep and merino sheep.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for shearing operation

elements.title: Recognise and correct faults in own shearing technique

pcs.text: Analyse own shearing technique using identified positions and focusing on humane handling of sheep in line with animal welfare and work health and safety (WHS) standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse own shearing technique using identified positions and focusing on humane handling of sheep in line with animal welfare and work health and safety (WHS) standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse own shearing technique using identified positions and focusing on humane handling of sheep in line with animal welfare and work health and safety (WHS) standards.

pcs.text: Recognise and correct faults in sheep position, footwork and free hand use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and correct faults in sheep position, footwork and free hand use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and correct faults in sheep position, footwork and free hand use.

pcs.text: Recognise and correct faults in the number of blows and their placement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and correct faults in the number of blows and their placement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and correct faults in the number of blows and their placement.

pcs.text: Improve coordination of footwork, free hand use, sheep control and blow placement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Improve coordination of footwork, free hand use, sheep control and blow placement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Improve coordination of footwork, free hand use, sheep control and blow placement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Recognise and correct faults in own shearing technique

elements.title: Apply techniques to increase shearing speed and accuracy

pcs.text: Increase speed at which the handpiece is pushed forward and returned between blow placements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Increase speed at which the handpiece is pushed forward and returned between blow placements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Increase speed at which the handpiece is pushed forward and returned between blow placements.

pcs.text: Improve the power, direction and manoeuvrability applied at the increased speed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Improve the power, direction and manoeuvrability applied at the increased speed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Improve the power, direction and manoeuvrability applied at the increased speed.

pcs.text: Improve rhythm at the increased speed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Improve rhythm at the increased speed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Improve rhythm at the increased speed.

pcs.text: Maintain calm and consistent temperament whilst shearing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain calm and consistent temperament whilst shearing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain calm and consistent temperament whilst shearing.

pcs.text: Recognise the importance of stamina and fitness in improvement of output consistency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise the importance of stamina and fitness in improvement of output consistency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise the importance of stamina and fitness in improvement of output consistency.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply techniques to increase shearing speed and accuracy

elements.title: Communicate with wool harvesting team members and shear sheep to industry quality standards

pcs.text: Demonstrate safety procedures during shearing in relation to self, other less experienced shearers and sheep
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Demonstrate safety procedures during shearing in relation to self, other less experienced shearers and sheep?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Demonstrate safety procedures during shearing in relation to self, other less experienced shearers and sheep.

pcs.text: Identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and rectify by taking personal action or by reporting to appropriate person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and rectify by taking personal action or by reporting to appropriate person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and rectify by taking personal action or by reporting to appropriate person.

pcs.text: Avoid excessive wool contamination and damage to the wool by shearing in the identified manner and by communicating with the team to ensure the boards are kept clean
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Avoid excessive wool contamination and damage to the wool by shearing in the identified manner and by communicating with the team to ensure the boards are kept clean?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Avoid excessive wool contamination and damage to the wool by shearing in the identified manner and by communicating with the team to ensure the boards are kept clean.

pcs.text: Shear required number of sheep and tally sheep shorn using identified method and positions in a normal eight-hour working day
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shear required number of sheep and tally sheep shorn using identified method and positions in a normal eight-hour working day?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shear required number of sheep and tally sheep shorn using identified method and positions in a normal eight-hour working day.

pcs.text: Use appropriate movement of feet and hands, and maintain correct positioning to the downtube
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate movement of feet and hands, and maintain correct positioning to the downtube?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate movement of feet and hands, and maintain correct positioning to the downtube.

pcs.text: Release sheep at increased speed in line with workplace procedures and WHS standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Release sheep at increased speed in line with workplace procedures and WHS standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Release sheep at increased speed in line with workplace procedures and WHS standards.

pcs.text: Follow and communicate workplace biosecurity, environment and traceability policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow and communicate workplace biosecurity, environment and traceability policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow and communicate workplace biosecurity, environment and traceability policies.

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members to ensure steady workflow according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to ensure steady workflow according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to ensure steady workflow according to workplace standards.
